title: Convolutional networks can learn to generate affinity graphs for image segmentation
abstract: We show that convolutional networks can be trained to produce affinity graphs — edge-weighted graphs indicating boundary probability between neighboring voxels — enabling neuron segmentation in EM volumes.
notes: Already in existing 102. Turaga is first author. Foundational paper connecting deep learning to connectomics. Links Turaga-Jain-Helmstaedter-Briggman-Denk-Seung.
